name: design-builder
description: Build distinctive production-grade interfaces on web + iOS through 6 user-facing commands (/setup, /design_page, /design_screen, /build, /improve, /review). Spec-first workflow: design specs (markdown) precede code generation. Knowledge-base skills: `design` (anti-patterns, HIG, BM25 search), `motion` (web animation libraries — GSAP/WAAPI/CSS/Anime/Lottie/Three — and short-video via HyperFrames), and `playwright-cli` (browser automation for visual audits and live web reference capture). designlib MCP supplies authoritative palettes/fonts/inspiration_pages. Evolved from superdesign 1.2.
